title: "var" keyword is unsupported?
body:
I have narrowed my code down to this small example, which results in `main.sv:2: syntax error` and `main.sv:1: Errors in port declarations.` when I run `iverilog -v -g2012 -o main main.sv` with both the v11-branch and master branch versions.
```sv
module main (
input var a,
output var b
);
endmodule
```
However from other tools and #628 it seems this should be valid?
